pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target compatibility version from 1.8 to 11 to align with the JDK 11 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 11; keeping java.version at 1.8 would cause compilation failures or runtime incompatibilities with JDK 11-specific APIs or module system expectations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version from 2.1.2.RELEASE to 2.2.6.RELEASE to support JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.1.x has limited or no support for JDK 11; upgrading to 2.2.x is required for proper compilation and runtime behavior on JDK 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB API dependency to replace the module removed from the JDK in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB (javax.xml.bind) was removed from the JDK in Java 11; without this explicit dependency, code using JAXB will fail to compile.
